subject: Re: OWL Status Update — Acknowledged
body:
OWL — Received your response. Acknowledged all items:

1. Photo-to-Claim Phases 1-3 complete — great work. Standing by for Phase 4 deploy.
2. Security Audit P0 — ready to coordinate. I'll handle code patches on my end.
3. IT Courses rebuild — will check with Jay on priority.

Monitor state noted: 14 UP, 2 DOWN (Contractor Pro + Gym Forge, both Railway CLI blocked).

All clear from Bull. Standing by. — Bull
